RESUME CONTACT

Welcome! I’m Diogo from Lisbon. I’ve been coding since 2016 and spent the last two and a half years developing AR games in Unity. Recently, I’ve been tinkering with shaders and fluid sims in my spare time.

This site collects some of the things I’ve shipped and some experiments I’m working on. If you want to chat about a role or a collab, drop me a line.

I had the privilege of working at ONTOP Studios, an AR indie studio, as part of a small, fast-moving team of passionate developers. I got to experience both ends of the spectrum, from scrappy early prototypes to fully shipped, production-ready titles.

Working primarily in Unity, my responsibilities spanned the full stack; from UI and gameplay programming to collaborating closely with design and art to keep production running smoothly.

We shipped to iOS and Android, prototyped for Oculus Quest and Apple Vision Pro, and worked with a proprietary web-based AR engine.

Click on the images to learn more about each project!

Placeholder for personal content. Hobbies, side projects.
